questions.question: What is the role of a default gateway entry inside a client machine's routing profile?
answers: The local database server recording updates
The backup DNS server utilized when primary queries fail
The physical hardware switch port connected to the line
The destination path used for traffic traveling outside the local network subnet boundary

questions.question: What metric parameter does the Routing Information Protocol (RIP) utilize to determine the best path?
What algorithm forms the mathematical engine used by OSPF to compute shortest path trees?
Which protocol encapsulates web traffic inside an encrypted SSL/TLS session framework layer?
What type of firewall monitors the state of active connections to determine whether to block a packet?
How does Asymmetric Encryption handle session key setup operations?
answers: It uses a public key to encrypt data and a matching separate private key to decrypt it
It relies on a single shared symmetric key rotated periodically
It hashes password strings using random salt variables
It restricts traffic lanes to specific local MAC configurations

questions.question: What type of intrusion occurs when an attacker intercepts and modifies communications between two endpoints?
What flag sequence handles a standard connection teardown/closure inside TCP transport logic?
What does the 'Sliding Window' mechanism accomplish inside a TCP session tracking pipeline?
answers: Cryptographic block rotations to shield payload fields
Horizontal expansion of port bounds when traffic spikes occur
Dynamic flow control to regulate how much data a sender can transmit before an ACK is required

questions.question: Which of the following traits characterizes the User Datagram Protocol (UDP) data stream?
answers: Operates exclusively inside Layer 3 routing tracks
Connectionless, lightweight, and lacks delivery guarantees or sequencing
Mandates manual packet handshakes before transmission
Reliable, connection-oriented, and features heavy window sizing flows
